contractDocuments.notes: Candidate generated OpenAPI bundle for synchronous public operations.
Candidate AsyncAPI event contract for runtime notifications.

forbiddenLeakageTests: public OpenAPI paths must not expose /internal, /materialization-store, /assertion-store, /promotion-state, or /authority-state direct mutation
generated SDK target must not contain generic save/update/delete helpers for canonical truth or governed materializations
internal schema catalog entries must not be included in public SDK models unless separately listed in public schema catalog

generationRules: SDKs are generated only from public OpenAPI, public AsyncAPI, public schema catalog, public surface manifest, and reason-code registry.
Runtime storage schemas and platform-internal module interfaces are not SDK input.
All public operationIds must be stable and unique.
All generated clients must bootstrap against capability discovery before operation execution.
validationGates: Schema examples validate against Phase 7 draft schemas.
All public operationIds in OpenAPI are present in the public surface manifest.
No known internal path fragment appears in the public OpenAPI path table.
SDK boundary assertions have no BLOCKER failures.
notes: Implementation/conformance candidate pack. Does not replace active machine contracts or active baseline law.
